guarantees: Uses the production catalog, frontend, reducer and store with value-owned memory filesystem inputs; no semantic fact is fabricated.
No filesystem side effect; invalid/partial safety remains invalid.
Pure deterministic projection of validated edits.
Rechecks source digest, path safety, authorization and writer lock.
Preserves all relevant commands as build variants; does not first-win.
Returns canonical deterministic order.
Returns zero, one or many commands; ambiguity is visible.
Builds only missing coverage while retaining partial failures.
